playbooks.name: search-sharepoint
playbooks.description: Search SharePoint precisely — translate the request into KQL (filename, filetype, site path, author, date) and run sharepoint_search.

playbooks.name: search-mail
playbooks.description: Search Outlook mail precisely — translate the request into mail KQL keywords (from / to / subject / received / hasattachments) and run the search in the Outlook web app.
